summary: Critical failures: (1) Action refs not pinned to SHA—`uses: actions/checkout@v4` and `uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4` violate explicit requirement and will fail actionlint. (2) cli.ts has dead code: line 42 `void raw;` after `const raw = Bun.file(path)`. (3) Inconsistent file I/O: `Bun.file().text()` mixed with `require('node:fs').readFileSync()`. Workflow will not pass actionlint validation as stated. Architecture is sound (good modular design, DI, error handling), but execution falls short of stated requirements.
